name: clinical-ai-assistant
title: Clinical AI Assistant
description: The flagship Clinical AI composition — floating trigger, sheet, visible context, transcript, suggestions, and composer. The same props render a full-page workspace.

props.name: variant
props.description: `floating` mounts the trigger + sheet; `page` renders the same conversation inline as a full-height workspace and ignores the trigger props.

props.name: open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange
props.description: Panel state. Uncontrolled unless `open` is supplied.

props.name: onRequestClose
props.description: Guards every dismissal — close button, Escape, overlay. Return false to keep the panel open.

props.name: trigger / hideTrigger / triggerPlacement / unread / attention / triggerLabel / triggerTooltip
props.description: The AiAssistantButton. `unread` reports new assistant output, never an urgent clinical event.

props.name: header / title / subtitle / status / statusLabel / onNewChat / headerActions
props.description: The AiChatHeader. `header` replaces the whole block.

props.name: context / contextLabel / onManageContext / contextBar
props.description: Context chips rendered in an AiContextBar. `contextBar` replaces it — e.g. with an ai-patient-context-card.

props.name: children
props.description: The transcript: ai-message, answer cards, ai-thinking, ai-error-state.

props.name: empty
props.description: Shown when the transcript is empty — typically ai-empty-state.

props.name: suggestions / suggestionLayout
props.description: Prompt chips or suggestion cards, above the composer.

props.name: composer / value / defaultValue / onValueChange / onSubmit / onStop / streaming / disabled / placeholder / restrictions / tools
props.description: The AiPromptInput. `tools` is the slot for voice, attachments, and context controls; `composer` replaces the whole block, disclaimer included.

props.name: disclaimer
props.description: Safety notice directly above the composer — typically ai-clinical-disclaimer.

clinicalNotes: The block owns panel-open state and nothing else. It does not call a model, transcribe audio, retrieve patient data, or perform any clinical check — the transcript, streaming, context, and every safety check stay with the consumer, so a product cannot inherit clinical behaviour it never authorised. Two properties are deliberately structural rather than optional: the context bar sits above the transcript so a clinician sees which patient, encounter, and date range a prompt will carry before sending it, and dismissal is routed through `onRequestClose` so a drafted prompt, an active recording, or an unreviewed answer cannot be lost to a stray Escape. Generated content is for review; wire `disclaimer` and `restrictions` with copy that describes the real review boundary rather than a blanket notice.
notes: Floating variant renders a fixed trigger (bottom-right by default) plus the sheet — mount it once, near the root of the surface. Page variant needs a bounded height from its parent (h-full / h-[40rem]) so the transcript scrolls instead of the page. Voice, attachments, evidence panels, and task-output cards (ai-summary, ai-note-draft, ai-medication-check, ai-differential-list, ai-order-suggestion) are opt-in: pass them through `tools` and the transcript.
